bead.title: refactor(agent): ddx agent route-status recent decisions should read kind:routing bead evidence
bead.description:
Opus epic review (2026-04-15) flagged source divergence: ddx agent route-status recent decisions reads from RoutingMetricsStore (.ddx/agent-logs/routing-outcomes.jsonl, agent_route_status.go:290-302), but V8 (ddx-bfc1aeaf) writes decisions to kind:routing bead evidence. Same concept, two stores.

Options: (a) teach route-status to also query kind:routing evidence, or (b) unify by making kind:routing the canonical source and deleting RoutingMetricsStore.
bead.acceptance: (1) ddx agent route-status recent surfaces kind:routing events from bead evidence, not just RoutingMetricsStore. (2) A decision against bead X appears in route-status recent after execute-bead X runs. (3) Either both stores coexist with a doc comment explaining why, or one is deleted.
